chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2487 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 9178/18 2. For hearing of main case 25.02.2019 This petition was filed on 21.07.2017 for quashment of F.I.R. bearing Crime No.201/2017 of P.S Sakrand. However, the record reflects that the petitioner or his Counsel have never appeared since filing of this petition. Today, also no one is present and no intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
